# Product Roadmap — ORGANVM Logos

This roadmap bridge strategy and execution for the portfolio ecosystem.

## 🏗️ Strategic Themes

- **Phase I: Rigor (Q1 2026)** — Hardening the quality pipeline and reaching Phase W10. (Current)
- **Phase II: Intelligence (Q2 2026)** — Integrating agentic autonomous distribution and dynamic strikes.
- **Phase III: Expansion (Q3 2026)** — Mapping the full Eight-Organ network with interactive visualization.

## 🛠️ Field Taxonomy

We use the following custom fields in our [GitHub Project](https://github.com/users/4444j99/projects/1):

| Field | Values |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Status** | `Triage`, `Backlog`, `Design`, `In Progress`, `Validation`, `Done` |
| **Strategic Theme** | `Infrastructure`, `Artistic`, `Strategic`, `Governance` |
| **Confidence** | `High`, `Medium`, `Low` |
| **Target Ship Date** | Monthly cadence |

## 🔄 Governance Protocols

- **Triage Protocol:** Every Monday at 09:00 AM. Review all new issues.
- **WIP Limits:** Max 2 active items per organ focus.
- **Validation Gate:** No item moves to `Done` without a passing `npm run verify:quality` run in CI.

## 📈 Current Initiatives

- [ ] **Autonomous Strike Images** (Theme: Strategic)
- [ ] **D3.js Operative Dashboard** (Theme: Infrastructure)
- [ ] **Local LHCI Fallback** (Theme: Infrastructure)
- [x] **Phase W10 Quality Ratchet** (Theme: Governance)
